---
name: Bug report
about: A command behaves differently than documented, or an agent consistently does the wrong thing
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Which command?**
e.g. `/gates`, `/feature`, `/review`

**What did the agent do?**
Describe what happened.

**What should it have done?**
What the documented behaviour says should happen.

**Project context**
What kind of iOS project? Architecture, iOS version, any relevant CLAUDE.md rules that might be relevant.

**Reproducing**
Steps to reproduce — what spec/plan input triggered this, or what stage of the pipeline you were at.
